title: The total change of a KdV conservative update is zero when boundary fluxes match

source.notes: Zero-change form of KdV conservative mass preservation.

informal.statement: If the right and left KdV-like fluxes match, then the total change caused by the KdV conservative update is zero.
assumptions: scale, nonlinear, and dispersion are real numbers
u is a real-valued grid state
n is the number of cells in the finite range
the KdV boundary flux mismatch is zero
informal.expected_conclusion: The total change after the KdV conservative update is zero.

declarations.name: totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq
declarations.statement: theorem totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n = kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n - totalOn u n = 0

tasks.input: Translate the zero total-change theorem for a KdV conservative update under matching boundary fluxes into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n = kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n - totalOn u n = 0

tasks.input: Given totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate and a boundary-flux equality, complete the proof.
tasks.target: A proof by rewriting with totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate, applying the boundary equality, and using ring.
